emails.subject: RE: Bill Rome Mediation
emails.body: RE: Bill Rome Mediation I got a call from Rome's lawyer, who wants to call the whole thing off because he doesn't think he'll get the money he wants. I told him we were ready and willing to proceed. He was going to call the mediator to see if he could cancel without incurring the mediation fees. So, I'll keep you posted. Michelle To: Goode, Diane; Cash, Michelle

emails.subject: RE: Bill Rome Mediation
emails.body: If I were Bill's lawyer, I would assume the same thing. That would be great if we could call it all off I would think we need to get some documentation to that affect?

emails.subject: RE: Bill Rome Mediation
emails.body: Thank you! To: Palmer, Lizzette; Howard, Kevin A.; Goode, Diane; Slone, Jeanie
